creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
A quick fix for TESTS build

  $ make
  ...
  c++ ... -o wesnoth_test tests/main.o ... -lboost_unit_test_framework ...
  /usr/bin/ld: /usr/lib/crt1.o: in function _start:/usr/src/lib/csu/amd64/crt1.c:93: error: undefined reference to 'main'
  collect2: ld returned 1 exit status

--- b.diff begins here ---
Index: games/wesnoth-devel/files/patch-src-tests-main.cpp
===================================================================
RCS file: games/wesnoth-devel/files/patch-src-tests-main.cpp
diff -N games/wesnoth-devel/files/patch-src-tests-main.cpp
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ games/wesnoth-devel/files/patch-src-tests-main.cpp	25 Aug 2010 05:48:44 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/tests/main.cpp~
++++ src/tests/main.cpp
+@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
+ #define GETTEXT_DOMAIN "wesnoth-test"
+ 
+ 
++#define BOOST_TEST_DYN_LINK
+ #define BOOST_TEST_MODULE wesnoth unit tests master suite
+ #include <boost/test/unit_test.hpp>
+ #include <boost/test/unit_test_monitor.hpp>
--- b.diff ends here ---
